General

products.name: Video Processing Block
products.descriptor: Onboard video processing unit providing stabilization, object tracking, and IP streaming for gimbal systems; 200 g

evidence.snippet:
VPB-4 Video Processing Block
----------------------------

The VPB-4 connects to a compatible camera system – such as the USG-231 or USG-261 – via two interfaces: USB 3.0 and XP1.Once connected, the unit captures the camera’s video signal, processes it (stabilization, tracking, etc.), and relays it to the operator interface.This module is included as standard with most UAS Components stabilized EO/IR gimbal systems.
